The operator in the Short description filter changed from “starts with” to “contains.”
The Short description filter’s value field became filled with “#SERIES-c8c8c533-7.”
The filter builder bar disappeared and was replaced by a breadcrumb line “All > Short description starts with” above the table, indicating the filter was run.
A new “Order results by the following fields” section appeared with a sort on Amount (a to z) and an X button to remove it.
The Short description column header became highlighted and a three-dot options button appeared next to the header text.
